data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
data.description: Users are encouraged to enable multi-factor authentication to enhance account security.

data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Messages and media are encrypted to protect user privacy.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes TLS for encrypting data in transit.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts regular security audits and pen tests to identify and rectify vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Uses automated vulnerability scanners and manual testing.

data.title: Bug Bounty Program
data.description: Encourages ethical hacking to find security vulnerabilities by offering bounties.
data.technical_spec: Collaborates with platforms like HackerOne for bug reporting.

data.title: Rate Limiting
data.description: Prevents abuse and DDoS attacks by implementing strict rate limiting on APIs.
data.technical_spec: API Gateway with rate limiting rules.
